description: While walking along the wooded area at Chico Basin, we spotted a large dark bird soaring in the distance. Jacqui (this reporter) first observed the bird through her 10X50 binoculars and noticed destict white banding on the tail of a very dark brid. Steve was able to photograph the bird with his 420mm Camera which led to confusion about what it may have been. After consulting other birders and the Merlin Bird ID application the concencous of Common Black Hawk was established. Once that ID was considered, there is no doubt about what the ID is.
